//: PROOF OF CONCEPT. A representative slice of the CV as structured data. The point is to test whether hand-editing this feels good. Try: open in VS Code, add an entry, hover a field for its description, mistype a key and watch it underline red. Publications live in publications.json (CSL-JSON).
